title.rendered: TOP 8 Hotel Around Yiwu Toy Market

content.rendered:
There are hundreds small hotels near Yiwu Toy Market with price level from US$20 to US$150, nice, clean and free WIFI. Below I will introduce top 8 hotels around Yiwu Toy Market for you.

TOP1. Yiwu Shangri-La Hotel

Contact Info：

Address: No. 6 & 8, Futian Road, Yiwu, Zhejiang Province China;

Location: Near Yiwu Futian Market;

Phone: (86 579) 8151 8888

Room Price ：

Deluxe Room  CNY 775;

Deluxe River View Room  CNY 825;

Horizon Executive Room  CNY 1075;

Executive Suite  CNY 1775;

Star：5 stars

TOP2. Yiwu Marriott Hotel

Contact Info：

Address: 188 Futian Road, 322000 Yiwu, China;

Location: Near Yiwu Futian Market;

Phone: (86 579) 81558888-8888

Room Price:

DELUXE GRAND ROOM  CNY 857;

DELUXO STANDRD ROOM  CNY 971;

EXECUTIVE ROOM  CNY 1200;

EXECUTIVE DOUBLE ROOM  CNY 1657;

Star：5 stars

TOP3. Sanding New Century Grand Hotel Yiwu

Contact Info：

Address: 188 Futian Road, 322000 Yiwu, China;

Location: Near Yiwu Futian Market;

Phone: (86 579) 85118888

Room Price:

DELUXE GRAND ROOM  CNY 548;

DELUXO STANDRD ROOM  CNY 548;

VIEW ROOM  CNY 668;

BUSINESS ROOM  CNY 668;

Star：5 stars

TOP4. CROWN PLAZA YIWU EXPO

Contact Info：

Address: 57 East Zongze Road (Zongze Dong Lu), Number of rooms: 367;

Location: Crowne Plaza Yiwu Expo to Yiwu Toy Market about 3 KM;

Phone: (86 579) 85798888

Room Price:

SUPERIOR ROOM  CNY 696;

DELUXE ROOM  CNY 791;

EXECUTIVE ROOM  CNY 981;

SUPERIOR SUITE  CNY 1646;

Star：5 stars

TOP5. CROWN PLAZA YIWU EXPO

Contact Info：

Address: 99 Futian Road (Futian Lu), Number of rooms: 285;

Location: Best Western Premier Yiwu Ocean Hotel to Yiwu Toy Market about 0.19 Km;

Phone: (86 579) 85188888

Room Price:

DELUXE SINGLE ROOM  CNY 500;

SUPERIOR ROOM CNY 420;

BUSINESS ROOM  CNY 420;

EXECUTIVE SINGLE ROOM  CNY 650;

Star：4 stars

TOP6. YIWU YINDU HOTEL

Contact Info：

Address: 168 Binwang Road (Binwang Lu), Number of rooms: 217;

Location: Yiwu Yindu Hotel to Yiwu Toy Market about 1.5 KM;

Phone: (86 579) 85588888

Room Price:

STANDARD ROOM   CNY 398;

BUSINESS ROOM  CNY 418;

EXECUTIVE ROOM   CNY 508;

DELUXE EXECLUTIVE ROOM       CNY 560;

Star：4 stars

TOP7. YIWU YIHE HOTEL

Contact Info：

Address: 2 North Gongren Road (Gongren Bei Lu), Number of rooms: 281;

Location: Yiwu Yihe Hotel to Yiwu Toy Market about 10 minutes;

Phone: (86 579) 83558888

Room Price:

STANDARD ROOM      CNY 368;

DELUXE  ROOM  CNY 398;

EXECUTIVE ROOM CNY 518;

EXECUTIVE BUSINESS ROOM     CNY 568;

Star：4 stars

TOP8. YIWU BYLAND STAR HOTEL

Contact Info：

Address: 300 Chengbei Road (Chengbei Lu), Number of rooms: 131;

Location: Yiwu Byland Star Hotel to Yiwu Toy Market about 5 minutes;

Phone: (86 579) 89968888

Room Price:

SIGNLE ROOM      CNY 309;

DELUXE  ROOM  CNY 379;

EXECUTIVE ROOM CNY 439;

Star：3 stars

In addition, if you want to know more about hotel around Yiwu Toy Market Hotel, or you can’t book a hotel directly, you can also contact us. Poxst has a great relationship with many hotels in Yiwu so we can help you get a lower price.

 
 

Contact info：

Email：tech@poxst.com

Phone：+86 182-180-15293

Web: www.dtsupplier.com

 
 

Moreover, I think you need a guide for yiwu toys market.
